title: Channels
description: Connect external messaging platforms to receive notifications and interactive actions from your agents.

empty.title: No channels yet
empty.description: Connect a Feishu group or other messaging platform to push agent notifications and receive card actions.

orgSelector.label: Organization
orgSelector.noOrgs: You need to create or join an organization before configuring channels.

form.createDescription: Configure a messaging channel so your agents can send notifications and receive interactive actions.
form.editDescription: Update this channel's configuration. Secret fields left blank will keep their current values.
form.name: Channel Name
form.sectionFeishuDescription: Create an app in the Feishu Open Platform and copy its credentials below.
form.chat_id_hint: Paste the open_chat_id of the Feishu group the agent should post into.
form.encrypt_key_placeholder: Only required if event encryption is enabled

picker.title: Select a Feishu group
picker.description: Choose the group where confirmation cards will be sent. The bot must already be added to the group.
picker.empty: No groups found. Make sure the bot is added to at least one group.
picker.needCredentials: Fill in App ID and App Secret first.

discard.title: Discard unsaved changes?
discard.description: You have unsaved input. Are you sure you want to close?

details.title: Channel Details
details.callbackUrlHint: Register this URL on the platform's webhook page. The URL is public; the signed request contains a shared secret only the platform knows.
details.step2: Open Feishu Open Platform -> Events & Callbacks and paste the URL.
details.step3: Complete the challenge handshake (FIM One responds automatically).
details.step4: Subscribe to the card.action.trigger event so button clicks reach your agent.
details.copyToastFailed: Copy failed. Please copy the URL manually.

deleteDialog.title: Delete channel?
deleteDialog.description: This permanently removes the channel "{name}". Agents that post to this channel will stop delivering messages. This action cannot be undone.
